category_title: Students with internalizing behaviors and low self-confidence
scenario_title: Resistance to transitioning to academic work
minimal_context: The student is in an afternoon nurture group session and is asked to transition to key skills academic work.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to transition to our afternoon key skills work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits apart from the other pupils, experiencing social isolation, and does not prepare for the activity.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please get your materials ready for the task.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Displays low curricular engagement and avoids looking at the assignment.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to start the academic work now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Oh, no, do we have to do key skills? Oh, no, why do I got to do work?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to transition to our afternoon key skills work.

STUDENT: (Sits apart from the other pupils, experiencing social isolation, and does not prepare for the activity.)

TUTOR: Please get your materials ready for the task.

STUDENT: (Displays low curricular engagement and avoids looking at the assignment.)

TUTOR: We need to start the academic work now.

STUDENT: Oh, no, do we have to do key skills? Oh, no, why do I got to do work?

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Complaining and questioning the need to do work
related_quotes: oh, no, do we have to do key skills
oh, no, why do I got to do work
